content:
# elizaos/elizaos.github.io Monthly Report (April 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for April 2026 was primarily focused on maintaining the stability and security of the project infrastructure. The core effort centered on proactive dependency management to ensure the repository remains aligned with current project standards. This maintenance-focused period underscores the project's commitment to long-term reliability and secure open-source collaboration.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### Dependency Management
The primary technical focus for the month was the systematic update of project dependencies. By targeting the minor-and-patch dependency group, the team ensured that the repository remains up-to-date with the latest security patches and library improvements.
*   **Dependency Updates:** PR [#246](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/246) was opened to address two updates across the project, ensuring the codebase remains stable and secure.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there were no active issues reported throughout the month. The project currently maintains a clean issue tracker, reflecting a stable state for the documentation and repository infrastructure.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration during April was centered on the maintenance of the repository's dependency health. PR [#246](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/246) remains the focal point of current activity, awaiting review. The lack of new issues or bug reports suggests a period of operational stability for the project.
